data.title: AtlasClear Holdings' subsidiary, Wilson-Davis & Co., Inc., reports 295% increase in net income with new introducing broker-dealer.
data.description: TAMPA, Florida - AtlasClear Holdings, Inc. (NYSE American: ATCH) shared that its subsidiary, Wilson-Davis & Co, Inc. (“WDCO”), submitted audited financial reports promptly to regulatory authorities. The latest financial data highlighted notable enhancements in revenue, net income, and net capital. Additionally, Wilson-Davis revealed a partnership with a new introducing broker-dealer, Dawson James Securities, through a recently signed agreement to act as a correspondent clearing client. Wilson-Davis disclosed financials reflecting Year End 06/3, showcasing positive progress in key areas.

data.title: Imperial Petroleum Inc. (Nasdaq: IMPP) declares a div of $0.546875/share on its 8.75% Series A Preferred Shares, payable on Sept. 30, 2025.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, in Athens, Greece, Imperial Petroleum Inc. (Nasdaq: IMPP), a company specializing in seaborne transportation services for petroleum products, crude oil, and dry bulk, revealed a dividend declaration. The dividend amounts to $0.546875 per share for its 8.75% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock (known as the "Series A Preferred Shares"). This dividend is slated for payment on September 30, 2025, for shareholders listed as of September 25, 2025. It covers the period from the last dividend payout date on June 30, 2025, until September 29, 2025.

data.title: Vystar® relaunching Vytex® Cloud Bed-in-a-Box with 100% natural latex mattresses in Worcester, MA, OTCQB: VYST.
data.description: In Worcester, MA on September 12, 2025, it was announced that Vystar® Corporation (OTCQB: VYST) will resume the sale of the Vytex® Cloud Bed-in-a-Box Collection, featuring 100% all-natural latex mattresses available in three support levels. This mattress collection, a popular product of Vystar®, is set to be reintroduced to the market.

data.title: Dogecoin surges 20% in a week on upcoming DOGE ETF launch; may see another major rally. Analyst cites past gains up to 1,751%.
data.description: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has seen a 20% surge in the last week, buoyed by optimism surrounding the imminent launch of the DOJE ETF and new technical indicators pointing towards a potential significant upward movement. Crypto expert Kevin suggested that Dogecoin could be gearing up for its "final major surge of the cycle," highlighting monthly stochastic RSI crosses that have historically preceded substantial gains. In the 2015–2017 bull market, similar signals resulted in rallies of 270%, 1,852%, and 1,751%. In the current cycle, two such signals have already led to gains of approximately 280% and 497%, with the most recent cross indicating the potential for another significant...

data.title: 3G Capital has finished acquiring Skechers, the renowned footwear company.
data.description: A new report reveals that there has been a significant increase in cyberattacks globally, with a record-breaking 56% rise compared to last year. The report shows that over 300 million cyberattacks were detected in the first six months of this year alone. Interestingly, 47% of these attacks targeted small businesses, emphasizing the need for increased cybersecurity measures for all organizations. Ransomware attacks have also soared by 151% in the same period, with hackers demanding an average of $220,000 per attack. This highlights the growing threat of cybercrime and the importance of vigilance in online security practices.

data.title: Injective (INJ) rebounds to $14.16 (+1.22%) despite challenges, with $100M investment from Pineapple Financial. Bullish trend noted.
data.description: The stock for INJ is currently trading at $14.16, reflecting a positive increase of 1.22%. This surge comes in the wake of Pineapple Financial injecting a substantial $100 million investment into the company. Despite facing regulatory challenges recently, technical analysis indicates a strong bullish trend in the market, showcasing the resilience of INJ amidst external pressures.

data.title: Intuitive reveals live surgical data for da Vinci 5 system, enhancing precision and efficiency.
data.description: According to recent reports, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.2%. This decrease represents approximately 300,000 fewer unemployed individuals in the labor force. The economy has shown strong growth, with GDP increasing by 3.5% in the last quarter, surpassing analysts' expectations. Additionally, the stock market has seen a 15% increase in the past year, reaching record highs. Experts attribute this positive economic performance to various factors, including government stimulus packages and increased consumer spending. These trends are expected to continue in the coming months, further boosting economic recovery efforts.

data.title: New CEO Curt Queyrouze appointed by First Northwest Bancorp & First Fed Bank.
data.description: A recent report revealed that the global carbon emissions have reached a record high of 36.8 billion metric tons in 2021, marking a significant increase despite efforts to reduce carbon footprint. The study also found that the top three emitting countries are China, the United States, and India, contributing to more than half of the total emissions. This alarming trend emphasizes the urgent need for stronger measures to combat climate change and transition towards renewable energy sources. Experts warn that without immediate action, the world is at risk of facing irreversible consequences due to carbon pollution.

data.title: Electra receives C$17.5M funding from Ontario for C$100M cobalt refinery in Temiskaming Shores, 1st in North America.
data.description: In Toronto on September 12, 2025, Electra Battery Materials Corporation (NASDAQ: ELBM; TSX-V: ELBM) revealed it has secured a term sheet for a total of C$17.5 million in potential financing from Invest Ontario, a department of the Government of Ontario. The aim of this funding is to aid in the establishment of its cobalt sulfate refinery in Temiskaming Shores. Upon completion, this refinery will mark a significant milestone as the primary facility in North America specialized in the manufacture of battery-grade cobalt sulfate.

data.title: Joby Aviation plans to join White House eVTOL program, develop air taxis for commercial service; targeting FAA approval soon.
data.description: In Santa Cruz, California, Joby Aviation, Inc. disclosed intentions to join the White House eVTOL Integration Pilot Program (eIPP), aiming to develop air taxis for commercial passenger use. The company, listed on NYSE as JOBY, is set to be part of this initiative following the President's Executive Order. The directive tasks the Department of Transportation and Federal Aviation Administration to facilitate the deployment of mature eVTOL aircraft in specific markets before full FAA approval.

data.title: Upexi's Solana treasury hits $447M with $142M gains, thanks to surge in prices. Welcomes Arthur Hayes and reports 129% per share increase.
data.description: Upexi Inc. disclosed that its Solana treasury, valued at $447 million as of September 10, experienced unrealized gains worth $142 million. The surge in Solana prices was attributed to the impressive performance by the Tampa-based company. CEO Allan Marshall highlighted the contribution of digital asset veteran Arthur Hayes joining the Advisory Committee in enhancing visibility and investor connections at financial events. Chief Strategy Officer Brian Rudick mentioned that Upexi closed three lucrative capital raises, significantly boosting adjusted Solana per share by 129% through the strategy. The company also emphasized the benefits of staking and discounted token offerings.

data.title: Electra reveals details of $30M private placement for refinery construction, part of $30M financing for ongoing restructuring with Lenders.
data.description: In Toronto on September 12, 2025, Electra Battery Materials Corporation disclosed the specifics of its recently publicized financial restructuring plan. The company revealed the outlined terms of a $30 million financing agreement linked to the Restructuring. This financial move involved negotiations with the senior secured convertible notes' holders, referred to as the Lenders. Electra, traded as ELBM on NASDAQ and TSX-V, shared this pivotal development to showcase progress towards securing its financial position amidst ongoing changes.

data.title: CRV price surges by 4.91% to $0.82, indicating bullish momentum according to technical analysis.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Curve (CRV) is currently trading at $0.82, recording a 4.91% increase in value over the past day. Analysts point to bullish momentum as the price of CRV surpasses important moving averages, indicating potential for further growth.

data.title: Coffee Holding Company (JVA) reports $23.9M net sales in Q3, 2025, up by 27% from 2024, but faces $1.19M net loss.
data.description: In Staten Island on September 12, 2025, Coffee Holding Co., Inc. (Nasdaq: JVA) disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal quarter concluding on July 31, 2025. The Company reported net sales of $23.9 million in comparison to $18.8 million for the corresponding period in 2024, marking a 27% rise. Nevertheless, they encountered a net loss of $1.19 million for the period due to their derivative positions causing a $2.2 million negative effect on profitability, as stated by Andrew Gordon, the President and CEO of the Company.

data.title: "Global Quantum Dot Photonic Night Vision Sensor Array market report 2025-2035 shows early adoption by SWIR Vision Systems, Emberion, and Qurv Technologies."
data.description: The Quantum Dot Photonic Night Vision Sensor Array Market report has been recently released by ResearchAndMarkets.com. It focuses on the analysis of this market segment for the period 2025 to 2035. Quantum Dot Photonic Night Vision Sensor Arrays, known as QD-PNVSA, are solid-state image-sensing chips. These chips contain engineered semiconductor quantum dots deposited as a thin photo-absorbing film directly onto a silicon read-out ci. This report provides a global and regional analysis, with a detailed focus on applications, product types, and country-level analysis. It offers insights into the growing market trends and forecasts for the mentioned period.
